---
title: "AFL Betting"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-23"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries, include=FALSE}
library(fitzRoy)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(lubridate)
library(slider)
library(tidyr)
```

## R Markdown

```{r EWMA}
library(purrr)

calc_ewma <- function(x, alpha = 0.7) {
  if (length(x) == 0) return(numeric(0))
  accumulate(x, ~ alpha * .y + (1 - alpha) * .x)
}

```


```{r AFL Data}
##Extract Data spanning the past decade
current_year <- as.numeric(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"))
seasons <- 2016:current_year
data_player <- map_dfr(seasons, ~ fetch_player_stats(season = .x))

##Get AFL fixture to help determine opponent team 
fixtures <- fetch_fixture(season = current_year) %>%
  filter(status == "UNCONFIRMED_TEAMS") %>%
  dplyr::select(providerId, home.team.name, away.team.name)


##Extract AFL Lineup data of games that haven't happened
afl_lineups <- fetch_lineup_afl(season = current_year) %>%
  filter(status == "UNCONFIRMED_TEAMS") %>%
  left_join(fixtures, by="providerId") %>%
  mutate(year = year(utcStartTime),
         opponent = case_when(
           teamType == 'home' & teamName == home.team.name ~ away.team.name,
           teamType == 'away' & teamName == away.team.name ~ home.team.name
         ),
         venue = venue.name) %>%
  dplyr::select(providerId,
                status,
                player.playerId,
                player.playerName.givenName, 
                player.playerName.surname,
                position,
                year,
                round.roundNumber,
                teamName,
                opponent,
                venue
                )

## Extract total cbas in a game
#cba attended/total clearance per game to get percentage
ttl_cba_per_match <- data_player %>%
group_by(providerId) %>%
  summarise(
  total_cbs = sum( clearances.centreClearances, na.rm = TRUE),
  .groups = "drop")


## Create dataframe that will be binded onto player stats disposals
# Align afl_lineups columns to match player_stats_disposals schema
future_games <- afl_lineups %>%
  mutate(
    player.givenName                        = player.playerName.givenName,
    player.surname                          = player.playerName.surname,
    player.player.position                  = position,
    team.name                               = teamName,
    disposals                               = NA_real_,
    inside50s  = NA_real_,
    clearances.totalClearances             = NA_real_,
    timeOnGroundPercentage                  = NA_real_,
    CBA_prop    = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.pressureActs              = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.defHalfPressureActs       = NA_real_,
    contestedPossessions = NA_real_,
    uncontestedPossessions = NA_real_,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets = NA_real_,
    metresGained = NA_real_
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    providerId,
    status,
    player.playerId,
    player.givenName,
    player.surname,
    player.player.position,
    year,
    round.roundNumber,
    team.name,
    opponent,
    venue,
    disposals,
    clearances.totalClearances,
    inside50s,
    timeOnGroundPercentage,
    CBA_prop,
    #Following below is used for team stats
    contestedPossessions,
    uncontestedPossessions,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets,
    metresGained
  )



##Get the disposal stats
player_stats_disposals_concluded <- data_player  %>%
  left_join(ttl_cba_per_match, by = c("providerId")) %>%
  filter(status == "CONCLUDED" | status == "CONFIRMED_TEAMS" ) %>%
  mutate(year = year(utcStartTime),
         CBA_prop = (extendedStats.centreBounceAttendances/total_cbs) * 100,
         opponent = case_when(
           teamStatus == 'home' & team.name == home.team.name ~ away.team.name,
           teamStatus == 'away' & team.name == away.team.name ~ home.team.name
         ),
    venue = venue.name) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    providerId,
    status,
    player.playerId,
    player.givenName,
    player.surname,
    player.player.position,
    year,
    round.roundNumber,
    team.name,
    opponent,
    venue,
    disposals,
    inside50s,
    clearances.totalClearances,
    timeOnGroundPercentage,
    CBA_prop,
    #Following below is used for team stats
    contestedPossessions,
    uncontestedPossessions,
    extendedStats.groundBallGets,
    metresGained
    
  )

# Bind into the main dataframe
player_stats_disposals <- bind_rows(player_stats_disposals_concluded, future_games)

```

```{r feature_engineering}
##conduct feature engineering on the data that will be trained on

##Use lag function to get prior game disposal
player_stats_disposals <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(player.playerId) %>%
  mutate(
    disp_lag = lag(disposals),
    inside50s_lag = lag(inside50s),
    totalClearances_lag = lag(clearances.totalClearances),
    cba_lag = lag(CBA_prop),
    tog_lag = lag(timeOnGroundPercentage),
    cp_lag = lag(contestedPossessions),
    ucp_lag = lag(uncontestedPossessions),
    gbg_lag = lag(extendedStats.groundBallGets),
    mg_lag = lag(metresGained)
    
  )

##Calculate averages and use lag to shift prior
player_stats_disposals <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(player.playerId) %>%
  mutate(
    ewma_disp_lag    = replace(disp_lag, !is.na(disp_lag), calc_ewma(disp_lag[!is.na(disp_lag)])),
    ewma_inside50s_lag    = replace(inside50s_lag, !is.na(inside50s_lag), calc_ewma(inside50s_lag[!is.na(inside50s_lag)])),
    ewma_totalClearances_lag  = replace(totalClearances_lag, !is.na(totalClearances_lag), calc_ewma(totalClearances_lag[!is.na(totalClearances_lag)])),
    ewma_TOG_lag     = replace(tog_lag, !is.na(tog_lag), calc_ewma(tog_lag[!is.na(tog_lag)])),
    ewma_cba_lag     = replace(cba_lag, !is.na(cba_lag), calc_ewma(cba_lag[!is.na(cba_lag)])),
    avg_disp_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(disp_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    var_disp_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(disp_lag, ~ var(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_inside50s_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(inside50s_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_totalClearances_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(totalClearances_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_TOG_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(tog_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_cba_last5   = lag(slide_dbl(cba_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_disp_last3   = lag(slide_dbl(disp_lag, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 2, .complete = FALSE)),
    var_disp_last3   = lag(slide_dbl(disp_lag, ~ var(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 2, .complete = FALSE))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


opponent_defensive_profile <- player_stats_disposals %>%      # exclude future game rows
  group_by(year, round.roundNumber, opponent) %>%
  summarise(
    disp_conceded          = sum(disp_lag,                       na.rm = TRUE),
    cont_poss_conceded     = sum(cp_lag,            na.rm = TRUE),
    uncont_poss_conceded   = sum(ucp_lag,          na.rm = TRUE),
    gbg_conceded           = sum(gbg_lag,    na.rm = TRUE),
    metres_gained_conceded = sum(mg_lag,      na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

library(slider)

opponent_defensive_profile <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  arrange(opponent, year, round.roundNumber) %>%
  group_by(opponent, year) %>%
  mutate(
    # Rolling 5 game average for each stat
    avg_disp_conceded          = lag(slide_dbl(disp_conceded,          ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_cont_poss_conceded     = lag(slide_dbl(cont_poss_conceded,     ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_uncont_poss_conceded   = lag(slide_dbl(uncont_poss_conceded,   ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_gbg_conceded           = lag(slide_dbl(gbg_conceded,           ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE)),
    avg_metres_gained_conceded = lag(slide_dbl(metres_gained_conceded, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .before = 4, .complete = FALSE))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


league_avgs <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  filter(!is.na(avg_disp_conceded)) %>%
  summarise(
    league_disp          = mean(disp_conceded,          na.rm = TRUE),
    league_cont_poss     = mean(cont_poss_conceded,     na.rm = TRUE),
    league_uncont_poss   = mean(uncont_poss_conceded,   na.rm = TRUE),
    league_gbg           = mean(gbg_conceded,           na.rm = TRUE),
    league_metres_gained = mean(metres_gained_conceded, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

opponent_defensive_profile <- opponent_defensive_profile %>%
  mutate(
    opp_disp_factor          = avg_disp_conceded          / league_avgs$league_disp,
    opp_cont_poss_factor     = avg_cont_poss_conceded     / league_avgs$league_cont_poss,
    opp_uncont_poss_factor   = avg_uncont_poss_conceded   / league_avgs$league_uncont_poss,
    opp_gbg_factor           = avg_gbg_conceded           / league_avgs$league_gbg,
    opp_metres_gained_factor = avg_metres_gained_conceded / league_avgs$league_metres_gained
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    year, round.roundNumber, opponent,
    opp_disp_factor,
    opp_cont_poss_factor,
    opp_uncont_poss_factor,
    opp_gbg_factor,
    opp_metres_gained_factor
  )

player_stats_disposals <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  left_join(
    opponent_defensive_profile,
    by = c("opponent", "year", "round.roundNumber")
  )

```


```{r}
##Final Data Output


player_stats_disposals_concluded <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  filter(status == "CONCLUDED") %>% 
  dplyr::select(player.playerId,player.givenName, player.surname, 
         player.player.position, year, round.roundNumber, opponent, venue, disposals,
         disp_lag, cba_lag, tog_lag, totalClearances_lag, inside50s_lag,
         ewma_TOG_lag, ewma_disp_lag, ewma_cba_lag, ewma_inside50s_lag, ewma_totalClearances_lag, 
         avg_disp_last5, avg_cba_last5, avg_TOG_last5, avg_inside50s_last5, avg_totalClearances_last5,
        var_disp_last5, avg_disp_last3,
        var_disp_last3, opp_disp_factor, opp_cont_poss_factor, opp_uncont_poss_factor,
        opp_gbg_factor, opp_metres_gained_factor) %>%
  drop_na()

```




```{r}
##Model Development


##Standard negative binomial model
library(MASS)

# ── Sort by time ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
player_stats_disposals_concluded <- player_stats_disposals_concluded %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber)

# ── Train/test split ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
train <- player_stats_disposals_concluded %>% slice_head(prop = 0.9)
test  <- player_stats_disposals_concluded %>% slice_tail(prop = 0.1)

# ── Save known levels from train ──────────────────────────────────────────────
known_opponents <- levels(as.factor(train$opponent))
known_venues    <- levels(as.factor(train$venue))
known_positions <- levels(as.factor(train$player.player.position))

# ── Apply to train — add Unknown as a level even if unused ───────────────────
train <- train %>%
  mutate(
    opponent               = factor(opponent,               levels = c(known_opponents, "Unknown")),
    venue                  = factor(venue,                  levels = c(known_venues,    "Unknown")),
    player.player.position = factor(player.player.position, levels = c(known_positions, "Unknown"))
  )

# ── Fit model ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model_nb <- glm.nb(
  disposals ~ player.player.position + opponent + venue +
    ewma_TOG_lag + ewma_disp_lag + ewma_cba_lag +
    avg_disp_last5 + var_disp_last5 + avg_disp_last3 +
    disp_lag + cba_lag + tog_lag +
    avg_inside50s_last5 + avg_totalClearances_last5 +
    avg_cba_last5 + avg_TOG_last5 +
    ewma_inside50s_lag + ewma_totalClearances_lag +
    opp_disp_factor + opp_cont_poss_factor + opp_uncont_poss_factor +
    opp_gbg_factor + opp_metres_gained_factor,
  data = train
)

# ── Coerce unseen levels in test to Unknown ───────────────────────────────────
test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    opponent = ifelse(opponent %in% known_opponents, opponent, "Unknown"),
    venue    = ifelse(venue    %in% known_venues,    venue,    "Unknown"),
    player.player.position = ifelse(
      player.player.position %in% known_positions,
      player.player.position, "Unknown"
    ),
    opponent               = factor(opponent,               levels = c(known_opponents, "Unknown")),
    venue                  = factor(venue,                  levels = c(known_venues,    "Unknown")),
    player.player.position = factor(player.player.position, levels = c(known_positions, "Unknown"))
  )


# ── Predict on test ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lambda_test <- predict(model_nb, newdata = test, type = "response")



## XGBoost Model + Dynamic Sigma

library(xgboost)
library(dplyr)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. FEATURE ENGINEERING
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

player_stats_disposals_concluded <- player_stats_disposals_concluded %>%
  mutate(
    position_encoded = as.numeric(as.factor(player.player.position)),
    venue_encoded    = as.numeric(as.factor(venue)),
    opp_encoded      = as.numeric(as.factor(opponent))
  )

features_encoded <- c(
  "ewma_disp_lag","avg_disp_last5","avg_disp_last3",
  "ewma_TOG_lag","ewma_cba_lag","ewma_inside50s_lag",
  "ewma_totalClearances_lag","avg_inside50s_last5",
  "avg_totalClearances_last5","avg_cba_last5","avg_TOG_last5",
  "disp_lag","cba_lag","tog_lag",
  "var_disp_last5","var_disp_last3",
  "opp_disp_factor","opp_cont_poss_factor","opp_uncont_poss_factor",
  "opp_gbg_factor","opp_metres_gained_factor",
  "position_encoded","venue_encoded","opp_encoded"
)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2. TRAIN / TEST SPLIT
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

player_stats_disposals_concluded <- player_stats_disposals_concluded %>%
  arrange(year, round.roundNumber)

train <- player_stats_disposals_concluded %>% slice_head(prop = 0.9)
test  <- player_stats_disposals_concluded %>% slice_tail(prop = 0.1)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3. BASE MODEL (MEAN)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

train_matrix <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data  = as.matrix(train[, features_encoded]),
  label = train$disposals
)

test_matrix <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data  = as.matrix(test[, features_encoded]),
  label = test$disposals
)

params <- list(
  objective        = "count:poisson",
  eta              = 0.05,
  max_depth        = 5,
  subsample        = 0.8,
  colsample_bytree = 0.8,
  min_child_weight = 10
)

model_xgb <- xgb.train(
  params                = params,
  data                  = train_matrix,
  nrounds               = 1000,
  watchlist             = list(train = train_matrix, test = test_matrix),
  early_stopping_rounds = 30,
  verbose               = 1
)

# Predictions
lambda_train <- predict(model_xgb, train_matrix)
lambda_test  <- predict(model_xgb, test_matrix)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 4. DYNAMIC SIGMA MODEL (SQUARED RESIDUALS → SQRT)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

train_sigma <- train %>%
  mutate(
    lambda          = lambda_train,
    squared_residual = (disposals - lambda_train)^2  # predict variance, then sqrt
  )

sigma_matrix_train <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data  = as.matrix(train_sigma[, features_encoded]),
  label = train_sigma$squared_residual
)

sigma_matrix_test <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data  = as.matrix(test[, features_encoded])
)

sigma_model <- xgb.train(
  params = list(
    objective        = "reg:squarederror",
    eta              = 0.05,
    max_depth        = 3,        # shallower than mean model to avoid overfit
    subsample        = 0.8,
    colsample_bytree = 0.8,
    min_child_weight = 20        # higher than mean model — variance needs more data
  ),
  data    = sigma_matrix_train,
  nrounds = 500,
  verbose = 0
)

# ── Predict variance then sqrt to get sigma ───────────────────────────────────
sigma_test  <- sqrt(pmax(predict(sigma_model, sigma_matrix_test),  0))
sigma_train <- sqrt(pmax(predict(sigma_model, sigma_matrix_train), 0))

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 5. STABILISATION
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

sigma_global <- sd(train$disposals - lambda_train)

# Tune blend weight rather than hardcoding 0.7/0.3
# Higher alpha = more trust in dynamic sigma
alpha <- 0.6  

sigma_test  <- pmax(alpha * sigma_test  + (1 - alpha) * sigma_global, 1)
sigma_train <- pmax(alpha * sigma_train + (1 - alpha) * sigma_global, 1)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 6. CALIBRATION AWARE SIGMA TUNING
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Rather than arbitrary alpha, find the alpha that minimises calibration error

best_alpha <- NULL
best_cal_error <- Inf

for (alpha in seq(0.3, 0.9, by = 0.1)) {
  
  sigma_candidate <- pmax(
    alpha * sqrt(pmax(predict(sigma_model, sigma_matrix_test), 0)) + 
    (1 - alpha) * sigma_global, 1
  )
  
  cal_error <- mean(sapply(c(15, 20, 25, 30), function(l) {
    pred_prob   <- mean(pnorm(l - 0.5, mean = lambda_test, 
                              sd = sigma_candidate, lower.tail = FALSE))
    actual_rate <- mean(test$disposals >= l)
    (pred_prob - actual_rate)^2
  }))
  
  if (cal_error < best_cal_error) {
    best_cal_error <- cal_error
    best_alpha     <- alpha
  }
}

cat("Best alpha: ", best_alpha, "\n")
cat("Best calibration error: ", round(best_cal_error, 6), "\n")

# ── Apply best alpha ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sigma_test <- pmax(
  best_alpha * sqrt(pmax(predict(sigma_model, sigma_matrix_test), 0)) +
  (1 - best_alpha) * sigma_global, 1
)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 7. FINAL OUTPUTS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    lambda_xgb    = lambda_test,
    sigma_xgb_dyn = sigma_test,
    residuals_xgb = disposals - lambda_xgb
  )

cat("Dynamic Sigma (mean): ", round(mean(sigma_test), 4), "\n")
cat("Global Sigma:         ", round(sigma_global,     4), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(shapviz)
library(patchwork)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. PREP (unchanged)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
theta_nb       <- model_nb$theta
lambda_nb      <- lambda_test
lambda_xgb     <- lambda_test
sigma_xgb_norm <- sd(test$disposals - lambda_xgb)

theta_xgb_nb <- fitdistr(
  test$disposals,
  "negative binomial",
  start = list(mu = mean(lambda_xgb), size = 10)
)$estimate["size"]

test <- test %>%
  mutate(
    lambda_nb     = lambda_nb,
    lambda_xgb    = lambda_xgb,
    sigma_xgb_dyn = sigma_xgb_dyn,
    residuals_nb  = disposals - lambda_nb,
    residuals_xgb = disposals - lambda_xgb
  )

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2. POINT METRICS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
eval_point <- function(res) {
  c(MAE  = mean(abs(res), na.rm = TRUE),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean(res^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
    MBE  = mean(res, na.rm = TRUE))
}

point_metrics <- bind_rows(
  as.data.frame(t(eval_point(test$residuals_nb)))  %>% mutate(model = "glm.nb"),
  as.data.frame(t(eval_point(test$residuals_xgb))) %>% mutate(model = "XGB")
)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3. CALIBRATION
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lines_eval <- c(15, 20, 25, 30)

calibrate_nb <- function(lambdas, theta, label) {
  bind_rows(lapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
    tibble(
      model         = label,
      line          = l,
      avg_pred_prob = mean(pnbinom(l - 1, size = theta,
                                   mu = lambdas, lower.tail = FALSE)),
      actual_rate   = mean(test$disposals >= l),
      n             = nrow(test)
    )
  }))
}

calibrate_norm <- function(lambdas, sigma, label) {
  bind_rows(lapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
    tibble(
      model         = label,
      line          = l,
      avg_pred_prob = mean(pnorm(l - 0.5, mean = lambdas,
                                 sd = sigma, lower.tail = FALSE)),
      actual_rate   = mean(test$disposals >= l),
      n             = nrow(test)
    )
  }))
}

calibration_all <- bind_rows(
  calibrate_nb(test$lambda_nb,    theta_nb,          "glm.nb"),
  calibrate_nb(test$lambda_xgb,   theta_xgb_nb,      "XGB + NB"),
  calibrate_norm(test$lambda_xgb, sigma_xgb_norm,    "XGB + Normal (static)"),
  calibrate_norm(test$lambda_xgb, test$sigma_xgb_dyn,"XGB + Normal (dynamic)")
)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 4. RPS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
calc_rps_nb <- function(lambdas, theta, actuals, max_k = 60) {
  mapply(function(lam, act) {
    k        <- 0:max_k
    pred_cdf <- pnbinom(k, size = theta, mu = lam)
    act_cdf  <- as.numeric(k >= act)
    mean((pred_cdf - act_cdf)^2)
  }, lambdas, actuals)
}

calc_rps_norm <- function(lambdas, sigma, actuals, max_k = 60) {
  mapply(function(lam, act) {
    k        <- 0:max_k
    pred_cdf <- pnorm(k + 0.5, mean = lam, sd = sigma)
    act_cdf  <- as.numeric(k >= act)
    mean((pred_cdf - act_cdf)^2)
  }, lambdas, actuals)
}

rps_nb               <- calc_rps_nb(test$lambda_nb,   theta_nb,     test$disposals)
rps_xgb_nb           <- calc_rps_nb(test$lambda_xgb,  theta_xgb_nb, test$disposals)
rps_xgb_norm_static  <- calc_rps_norm(test$lambda_xgb, sigma_xgb_norm,      test$disposals)
rps_xgb_norm_dyn     <- calc_rps_norm(test$lambda_xgb, test$sigma_xgb_dyn,  test$disposals)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 5. LOG-LOSS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
calc_log_loss <- function(prob, actual) {
  eps  <- 1e-6
  prob <- pmin(pmax(prob, eps), 1 - eps)
  mean(-(actual * log(prob) + (1 - actual) * log(1 - prob)))
}

logloss_results <- bind_rows(lapply(lines_eval, function(l) {
  actual               <- as.numeric(test$disposals >= l)
  prob_nb              <- pnbinom(l - 1, size = theta_nb,       mu = test$lambda_nb,  lower.tail = FALSE)
  prob_xgb_nb          <- pnbinom(l - 1, size = theta_xgb_nb,  mu = test$lambda_xgb, lower.tail = FALSE)
  prob_xgb_norm_static <- pnorm(l - 0.5, mean = test$lambda_xgb, sd = sigma_xgb_norm,      lower.tail = FALSE)
  prob_xgb_norm_dyn    <- pnorm(l - 0.5, mean = test$lambda_xgb, sd = test$sigma_xgb_dyn,  lower.tail = FALSE)

  tibble(
    line     = l,
    model    = c("glm.nb", "XGB + NB", "XGB + Normal (static)", "XGB + Normal (dynamic)"),
    log_loss = c(
      calc_log_loss(prob_nb,              actual),
      calc_log_loss(prob_xgb_nb,          actual),
      calc_log_loss(prob_xgb_norm_static, actual),
      calc_log_loss(prob_xgb_norm_dyn,    actual)
    )
  )
}))

logloss_summary <- logloss_results %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  summarise(log_loss = mean(log_loss)) %>%
  arrange(log_loss)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 6. SUMMARY TABLE
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
summary_table <- tibble(
  Model = c("glm.nb", "XGB + NB", "XGB + Normal (static)", "XGB + Normal (dynamic)"),
  MAE   = c(mean(abs(test$residuals_nb)), rep(mean(abs(test$residuals_xgb)), 3)),
  RMSE  = c(sqrt(mean(test$residuals_nb^2)), rep(sqrt(mean(test$residuals_xgb^2)), 3)),
  MBE   = c(mean(test$residuals_nb), rep(mean(test$residuals_xgb), 3)),
  RPS   = c(mean(rps_nb), mean(rps_xgb_nb), mean(rps_xgb_norm_static), mean(rps_xgb_norm_dyn)),
  LogLoss = logloss_summary$log_loss
) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 4))

cat("\n=== MODEL COMPARISON ===\n")
print(summary_table)
cat("\n=== CALIBRATION ===\n")
print(calibration_all %>% arrange(line, model))
cat("\n=== PARAMETERS ===\n")
cat("Theta (glm.nb):       ", round(theta_nb,              4), "\n")
cat("Theta (XGB):          ", round(theta_xgb_nb,          4), "\n")
cat("Sigma (XGB static):   ", round(sigma_xgb_norm,        4), "\n")
cat("Sigma (XGB dynamic):  ", round(mean(test$sigma_xgb_dyn), 4), "\n")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 7. PLOTS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

plot_data <- tibble(
  actual      = test$disposals,
  pred_nb     = test$lambda_nb,
  pred_xgb    = test$lambda_xgb,
  res_nb      = test$residuals_nb,
  res_xgb     = test$residuals_xgb,
  sigma_dyn   = test$sigma_xgb_dyn
)

# ── 7a. Actual vs Predicted ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_avp_nb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_nb, y = actual)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = "#3B82F6") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, colour = "#1D4ED8") +
  labs(title = "Actual vs Predicted — glm.nb",
       x = "Predicted Disposals", y = "Actual Disposals")

p_avp_xgb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_xgb, y = actual)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = "#10B981") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, colour = "#065F46") +
  labs(title = "Actual vs Predicted — XGBoost",
       x = "Predicted Disposals", y = "Actual Disposals")

print(p_avp_nb + p_avp_xgb)

# ── 7b. Residual Plots ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_res_nb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_nb, y = res_nb)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = "#3B82F6") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, colour = "#1D4ED8") +
  labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted — glm.nb",
       x = "Fitted Values", y = "Pearson Residuals")

p_res_xgb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pred_xgb, y = res_xgb)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8, colour = "#10B981") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, colour = "#065F46") +
  labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted — XGBoost",
       x = "Fitted Values", y = "Residuals")

print(p_res_nb + p_res_xgb)

# ── 7c. Q-Q Plots ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
p_qq_nb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(sample = res_nb)) +
  stat_qq(alpha = 0.3, colour = "#3B82F6") +
  stat_qq_line(colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Q-Q Plot — glm.nb Residuals",
       x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles")

p_qq_xgb <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(sample = res_xgb)) +
  stat_qq(alpha = 0.3, colour = "#10B981") +
  stat_qq_line(colour = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Q-Q Plot — XGBoost Residuals",
       x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles")

print(p_qq_nb + p_qq_xgb)

# ── 7d. Calibration Plot per Line ─────────────────────────────────────────────
p_cal <- ggplot(calibration_all, aes(x = avg_pred_prob, y = actual_rate, colour = model)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(group = model)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  facet_wrap(~ line, labeller = label_both) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(title    = "Calibration Plot by Line",
       x        = "Mean Predicted Probability",
       y        = "Actual Hit Rate",
       colour   = "Model") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_cal)

# ── 7e. Validation Curve (RPS across lines) ───────────────────────────────────
lines_full <- 10:35

val_curve <- bind_rows(lapply(lines_full, function(l) {
  bind_rows(
    tibble(model = "glm.nb",
           line  = l,
           rps   = mean(calc_rps_nb(test$lambda_nb,   theta_nb,     test$disposals))),
    tibble(model = "XGB + NB",
           line  = l,
           rps   = mean(calc_rps_nb(test$lambda_xgb,  theta_xgb_nb, test$disposals))),
    tibble(model = "XGB + Normal (static)",
           line  = l,
           rps   = mean(calc_rps_norm(test$lambda_xgb, sigma_xgb_norm,     test$disposals))),
    tibble(model = "XGB + Normal (dynamic)",
           line  = l,
           rps   = mean(calc_rps_norm(test$lambda_xgb, test$sigma_xgb_dyn, test$disposals)))
  )
}))

p_val <- ggplot(val_curve, aes(x = line, y = rps, colour = model)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(title  = "Validation Curve — RPS by Disposal Line",
       x      = "Disposal Line",
       y      = "Mean RPS (lower = better)",
       colour = "Model") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_val)

# ── 7f. SHAP Summary Plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
shap <- shapviz(model_xgb, X_pred = as.matrix(test[, features_encoded]))

p_shap_bar <- sv_importance(shap, kind = "bar") +
  labs(title = "SHAP Feature Importance — XGBoost")

p_shap_bee <- sv_importance(shap, kind = "beeswarm") +
  labs(title = "SHAP Beeswarm — XGBoost")

print(p_shap_bar)
print(p_shap_bee)
```



```{r}
## Spawning in predictions from new data
# ── 1. Prepare new data with the same transformations ─────────────────────────
# Save levels from training data
pos_levels  <- levels(as.factor(player_stats_disposals_concluded$player.player.position))
venue_levels <- levels(as.factor(player_stats_disposals_concluded$venue))
opp_levels  <- levels(as.factor(player_stats_disposals_concluded$opponent))

# Get unseen data
new_data <- player_stats_disposals %>%
  filter(status != "CONCLUDED") %>% 
  dplyr::select(player.playerId,player.givenName, player.surname, 
         player.player.position, year, round.roundNumber, opponent, venue, disposals,
         disp_lag, cba_lag, tog_lag, 
         ewma_TOG_lag, ewma_disp_lag, ewma_cba_lag, 
         avg_disp_last5, avg_cba_last5, avg_TOG_last5,
        var_disp_last5, avg_disp_last3,
        var_disp_last3, opp_disp_factor, opp_cont_poss_factor, opp_uncont_poss_factor,
        opp_gbg_factor, opp_metres_gained_factor)
  

# Apply same levels to new data
new_data <- new_data %>%
  mutate(
    position_encoded = as.numeric(factor(player.player.position, levels = pos_levels)),
    venue_encoded    = as.numeric(factor(venue,     levels = venue_levels)),
    opp_encoded      = as.numeric(factor(opponent,  levels = opp_levels))
  )

new_data <- new_data %>%
  mutate(
    confidence_flag = case_when(
      is.na(ewma_disp_lag)  ~ "no_history",
      is.na(avg_disp_last3) ~ "insufficient_history",
      is.na(avg_disp_last5) ~ "insufficient_history",
      TRUE                  ~ "ok"
    )
  )

# ── 2. Create DMatrix (no label needed for prediction) ────────────────────────
new_matrix <- xgb.DMatrix(
  data = as.matrix(new_data[, features_encoded])
)

# ── 3. Predict lambda (expected disposal count) ───────────────────────────────
lambda_new <- predict(model_xgb, new_matrix)

# ── 4. Get over probabilities for a given line ─────────────────────────

# ── Define lines ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lines <- 10:30

# ── Generate probabilities for each line ─────────────────────────────────────
prob_table <- lapply(lines, function(l) {
  new_data %>%
    mutate(
      line           = l,
      prob_over_norm = pnorm(l - 0.5, mean = lambda_new, sd = sigma_xgb_norm, lower.tail = FALSE),
      decimal_odds   = 1 / prob_over_norm,
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent, line, prob_over_norm, decimal_odds, confidence_flag)  # adjust name col as needed
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

# ── View results ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

prob_table_wide <- prob_table %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent, line, decimal_odds, confidence_flag) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = line,
    values_from = decimal_odds,
    names_prefix = "line_"
  )

clean_odds <- extract_afl_props(all_markets) %>%
  mutate(fair_odds = 1/((1/odds)/1.08))

clean_odds_wide <- clean_odds %>%
  mutate(
    line      = as.numeric(str_extract(market, "\\d+")),
    full_name = selection_name
  ) %>%
  filter(
    stat == "disposals",
    str_detect(market, "^\\d+\\+\\s*[Dd]isposals$")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    player.givenName = str_extract(full_name, "^\\S+"),
    player.surname   = str_remove(full_name, "^\\S+\\s+")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, line, odds, fair_odds) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from   = line,
    values_from  = c(odds, fair_odds),
    names_glue   = "{.value}_{line}"
  ) %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(., "^odds_", "sportsbet_odds_"),    starts_with("odds_")) %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(., "^fair_odds_", "sportsbet_fair_odds_"), starts_with("fair_odds_"))

```

```{r}
# ── Join and filter insufficient history ─────────────────────────────────────
comparison <- prob_table_wide %>%
  left_join(clean_odds_wide, by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname")) %>%
  filter(confidence_flag == "ok")

# ── Derive common lines ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model_lines     <- as.numeric(str_extract(colnames(comparison)[str_detect(colnames(comparison), "^line_\\d+")], "\\d+"))
sportsbet_lines <- as.numeric(str_extract(colnames(comparison)[str_detect(colnames(comparison), "^sportsbet_odds_\\d+")], "\\d+"))
common_lines    <- intersect(model_lines, sportsbet_lines)

# ── Calculate EV ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (l in common_lines) {
  model_col     <- paste0("line_", l)
  sportsbet_col <- paste0("sportsbet_odds_", l)
  ev_col        <- paste0("ev_", l)

  comparison <- comparison %>%
    mutate(
      !!ev_col := (1 / .data[[model_col]]) * (.data[[sportsbet_col]] - 1) -
                 (1 - (1 / .data[[model_col]])) * 1
    )
}

# ── Pivot model odds long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent, starts_with("line_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("line_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "model_odds",
    names_prefix = "line_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Pivot sportsbet odds long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
sportsbet_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, starts_with("sportsbet_odds_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("sportsbet_odds_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "sportsbet_odds",
    names_prefix = "sportsbet_odds_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Pivot EV long ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ev_long <- comparison %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, starts_with("ev_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("ev_"),
    names_to     = "line",
    values_to    = "ev",
    names_prefix = "ev_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = as.numeric(line))

# ── Join all three and filter positive EV ────────────────────────────────────
comparison_long <- model_long %>%
  left_join(sportsbet_long, by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "line")) %>%
  left_join(ev_long,        by = c("player.givenName", "player.surname", "line")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ev), !is.na(sportsbet_odds), ev > 0) %>%
  dplyr::select(player.givenName, player.surname, opponent, line,
                model_odds, sportsbet_odds, ev) %>%
  arrange(desc(ev))

print(comparison_long, n = Inf)
```
